description: Legal document from Cairo, dated March of 1810 CE (17 Adar II 5570 AM), in which Moshe Shtiwi acknowledges an investment of 15,000 מכ (medin kesif) from Merkadah bt. Yaʿaqov. There are two additional notes on verso from 1811 and 1812 CE respectively, mentioning transfers of money and various types of currency: qurūsh, maḥbūb, frānsa.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
